name: Apple Pie in a Brown Bag
recipeInstructions:
1. Pastry: Combine the flour, sugar, and salt in a bowl. In another bowl, mix the oil and milk with the flour mixture. Pat the dough into a 9-inch pie plate.
2. Filling: Combine the sugar, flour, nutmeg, and cinnamon in a bowl. Toss with the sliced apples. Place in the pie crust.
3. Topping: Mix the flour, butter, and sugar in a bowl. Pour over the top of the pie.
4. Assemble: Fold the heavy brown paper bag (not a recycled one) closed. Place it in the center of the oven. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
5. Remove from oven with oven mitts, as there will be steam escaping from the bag.
Note: The bag may produce a small amount of smoke for the first few minutes. It should be folded closed when placed in the oven. As the pie bakes and the bag heats up, it will get darker in color – this is normal.
